case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERIC DIBBERN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DIBBERN, ERIC
DECLARATION OF MERCEDES A. GAVIN RE: LOST RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
